DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS6-L1-10001300-MSSS6-MKT-AAD-01 • MS Social Studies Grade 6 • Mesopotamia, Egypt, and Kush

The Case for Kush

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students getting ready for?
2QUESTION 2: What does the boy say about the Kush team’s argument?
3QUESTION 3: What will the girl probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Identify the school activity the students name. Identify what the boy says about the quality of the argument. Identify the scope the boy gives the girl for her research.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CA H-SS 6.2  |  MS Social Studies Grade 6: Mesopotamia, Egypt, and Kush
